creator: marcel@FreeBSD.org
text:
Revision 287299 (-current) adds a top command to the loader. A pre-compiled loader has been attached for your convenience. The top command can be used to display the current graphics mode (gop get), list all graphics modes (top list) and set a new graphics mode (top set <mode>).

Would you mind adding the list of modes to this PR and also check if other modes (if there are multiple) work better?
